_comment: Manual description overrides for ps_skill_db.json. Keyed by Hercules constant.
_comment2: Fields present here replace the scraped value for that key only (description and/or levels).
_comment3: This file is NOT regenerated by import_ps_skill_db.py — edits persist across rescrapes.

NJ_KIRIKAGE.description: Strikes a target with an attack whose range is equal to the caster's Shadow Jump range. Shadow Slash no longer possesses the capability to land critical strikes. However, when paired with the platinum skill - Shadow's Within, critical hits become a possibility.
